overview.description: The Reckoner Yield Enhanced AAA CLO ETF (RAAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in USD-denominated floating rate CLOs that are rated AAA or equivalent. The fund uses up to 50% leverage to seek higher income while focusing on credit quality and capital preservation. RAAA was launched on Jul 9, 2025 and is issued by Reckoner.

data.title: Reckoner Capital Management Launches First-Ever Leveraged AAA CLO ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AAACLO--Reckoner Capital Management announced the launch of the Reckoner Leveraged AAA CLO ETF (NYSE: RAAA), the first-ever levered AAA CLO ETF.
